Interface ITinAdvanced3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control advanced TIN functions.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("911FDE18-ABB0-4F7B-B960-F40DCD527B46")]
public interface ITinAdvanced3

Properties

TinVersion

Returns the version number of the TIN dataset.

esriTinVersion TinVersion { get; }

Property Value

esriTinVersion
